---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
labels: [documentation]
---

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Affected document or section
Provide file path(s), section title(s), or links.

## What is unclear, missing, or incorrect
Describe the problem precisely.

## Suggested improvement
Provide proposed wording, structure, or examples.

## Additional context
Add related issues, references, or screenshots if helpful.
